do_pattern: Use cubic-bezier for sophisticated motion curves that feel natural
dont_pattern: Use standard linear or ease-in-out which feel mechanical

do_pattern: Always respect prefers-reduced-motion for users with vestibular disorders
dont_pattern: Ignore motion preferences forcing animations on all users

do_pattern: Stagger child element animations for a polished sequential reveal
do_code: & > * { animation: fadeUp 0.5s ease both; } & > *:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.1s; } & > *:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.2s; }
dont_pattern: Animate all elements simultaneously creating a flash of content

do_pattern: Keep micro-interactions 100-300ms and page transitions 300-600ms
dont_pattern: Use animations longer than 1s for functional UI elements or shorter than 100ms which feel instant

do_pattern: Hang punctuation outside the text block for perfect visual alignment
dont_pattern: Leave quotes and bullets misaligned with the text edge

do_pattern: Use clamp() for responsive typography that scales smoothly between breakpoints
dont_pattern: Use fixed font sizes with media query jumps

do_pattern: Keep body text between 45-75 characters per line for optimal readability
dont_pattern: Allow text to span the full viewport width on large screens

do_pattern: Align all spacing to a baseline grid (4px or 8px) for visual harmony
dont_pattern: Use arbitrary spacing values that break visual rhythm

do_pattern: Use font-display swap and preload critical fonts to prevent FOIT
do_code: @font-face { font-display: swap; } <link rel="preload" href="font.woff2" as="font" crossorigin>
dont_pattern: Let fonts block rendering causing invisible text flashes

do_pattern: Provide subtle tactile feedback on all interactive elements
do_code: transform: scale(0.98); opacity: 0.9; transition: all 0.15s ease;
dont_pattern: Static buttons that only change cursor on hover

do_pattern: Minimum 44x44px touch targets with adequate spacing between interactive elements
dont_pattern: Small clickable areas that cause misclicks on mobile

do_pattern: Visible focus ring for keyboard navigation that doesn't rely on color alone
dont_pattern: Removing default focus styles without replacement

do_pattern: Show skeleton screens instead of spinners; maintain layout during loading
do_code: .skeleton { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #f0f0f0 25%, #e0e0e0 50%, #f0f0f0 75%); background-size: 200% 100%; animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite; }
dont_pattern: Using generic spinners that provide no layout context

do_pattern: Show inline validation with specific guidance next to the relevant field
do_code: Password needs at least 8 characters
dont_pattern: Generic error modals or toast messages far from the error source

do_pattern: Ensure 4.5:1 minimum for normal text and 3:1 for large text (18px+ bold or 24px+)
dont_pattern: Use low-contrast text for aesthetics

do_pattern: Design dark mode as a first-class experience not just an inverted light mode
dont_pattern: Simply inverting colors or using pure black/white

do_pattern: Use consistent semantic colors for status (success/warning/error/info) across the entire app
dont_pattern: Using arbitrary colors for status indicators or relying on color alone for meaning

do_pattern: Use a consistent spacing scale based on multiples (4px 8px 12px 16px 24px 32px 48px 64px)
dont_pattern: Use arbitrary pixel values that don't follow a scale

do_pattern: Use max-width containers with fluid padding — never let content touch viewport edges
dont_pattern: Fixed-width layouts that break on different screens

do_pattern: Define a z-index scale and stick to it — avoid z-index wars
dont_pattern: Using arbitrary large z-index values

do_pattern: Design empty states as opportunities to guide users toward their first action

dont_pattern: Showing blank white space or generic no data messages

do_pattern: Only show fields that are relevant based on previous selections; reduce cognitive load
dont_pattern: Showing all possible form fields at once overwhelming the user

do_pattern: Use appropriate input types and patterns (email/tel/date) for mobile keyboard optimization
dont_pattern: Using plain text inputs for structured data like email phone or dates

do_pattern: Pre-fill sensible defaults and remember user preferences to reduce effort
dont_pattern: Making users re-enter information the system already knows

do_pattern: Show breadcrumbs for deep navigation (3+ levels) using semantic markup
dont_pattern: Relying on browser back button as the only navigation method

do_pattern: Use bottom navigation for primary actions (max 5 items) on mobile apps
dont_pattern: Hamburger menus hiding critical navigation paths from mobile users

do_pattern: Use next-gen formats (WebP/AVIF) with srcset for responsive images and lazy loading
dont_pattern: Serving unoptimized full-resolution images to all devices

do_pattern: Inline critical above-the-fold CSS and defer non-critical stylesheets
do_code: <style>/* critical CSS inlined */</style><link rel="preload" href="full.css" as="style" onload="this.rel='stylesheet'">
dont_pattern: Loading entire CSS bundle before first paint

do_pattern: Use semantic HTML and ARIA labels for all interactive and dynamic content
dont_pattern: Using div/span for interactive elements without roles or labels

do_pattern: Never use color as the only means of conveying information — add icons, text, or patterns
dont_pattern: Relying solely on red/green to indicate success/failure

do_pattern: Use CSS logical properties for layouts that automatically flip in RTL contexts
dont_pattern: Using physical directional properties that break in RTL

do_pattern: Set proper direction and language attributes; ensure Arabic fonts load correctly
dont_pattern: Ignoring text direction or using Latin-only fallback fonts
